name: Haven Network
description: Haven is a mission-driven platform that radically simplifies access to government and corporate contracts--many of which businesses are unaware of. In a landscape of outdated systems, bureaucratic jargon, and scattered portals, Haven unites over 12,000 buying agencies into one intuitive platform. Acting as a business development partner, we automatically match businesses with the right opportunities, drastically reducing the time and effort required to find and secure contracts.
program: Techstars Los Angeles powered by J.P. Morgan

name: Aabshar
description: Aabshar is an impact-driven startup focused on addressing global water scarcity and high utility costs through innovative, AI-driven technology. Our patent-pending solution saves up to 98% of water usage, reduces utility expenses by up to 60%, and cuts CO2 emissions significantly. We empower homes, industries, and community centers, particularly in water-stressed regions, by providing real-time data and actionable insights to manage resources efficiently.
